productDisplayName: FILA Women Black Breath Sports Shoe
description: Designed for those who seek aggressive traction and a supportive Fit, these Breath shoes from fila work as hard as you to help keep up the pace. Upper Heavily meshed upper for maximum breathability Strategically placed synthetic overlays with design for enhanced shoe structure and style Central lacing system for a customised fit Meshed and padded tongue and collar for a snug fit Padded footbed for all day comfort Removable footbed to accommodate an orthotic Brand badge on the lateral midfoot Midsole Phylon midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection Outsole TPR outsole for enhanced durability with multi-directional lugs and a decoupled heel for absolute grip and traction Flex grooves on the forefoot for ease of movement Curved midfoot for ergonomic comfort Scooped heel for enhanced cushioning to the backfoot Shoe care Wipe surface with a damp clean cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
